summary: Iter 99 punch-policy + notifications + leave-balance fully verified end-to-end. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases pass covering the entire punch matrix (a-e), personal notification creation & isolation, first-punch-status, CL/PL balance and regression (double-IN + geofence-auto). Frontend: Leaves screen renders the new 'My Leave Balance' card (testID leave-balance-card) with correct CL/PL values from GET /api/leaves/balance. No bugs found; nothing needed to be fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py punch endpoint is ~430 lines long inside a single function — file already 17k+ lines. Consider extracting the punch endpoint (and identity/notification/broadcast sub-sections) into a routes module for maintainability (non-blocking).

AttendancePunch.biometric_method is a required Literal — the docstring above still says 'lat/lng optional' but nothing in the model calls out that biometric_method has no default; harmless but slightly stale.
seed_data_creation: Test-only firm 'cmp_iter99test' + TEST_ users/attendance/leaves/notifications + TEST_/UITEST_ session tokens seeded then fully cleaned up. python3 /app/scripts/cleanup_test_data.py --apply reported nothing left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Punch endpoint (server.py ~7735) now enforces mandatory GPS/geofence for every punch; only is_live_in bypasses coords. Manual mode (firm location_punching_enabled=false OR user.gps_punch_enabled=false) requires selfie_base64 + biometric_method plus GPS. Personal notifications with audience='user' + target_user_id + title 'Punch IN/OUT — <Firm>' inserted after successful punch (~line 8109). GET /api/leaves/balance returns cl/pl allowed/taken/balance from firm_masters.leave_policy + approved leaves in current year. Test file test_iter99_punch_policy.py is reusable; it seeds & cleans its own data and reads BASE_URL from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL.
rca_of_issue: N/A — implementation matched the spec; all matrix cases returned expected status codes and payload semantics.
